rationale: For an internal business productivity tool (mass mailing/mail merge), clarity, authority, and functional minimalism are paramount. We avoid decorative clutter and prioritize data density and scannability using strict grids and high-contrast typography.

rules: Headings never use Inter or generic sans.
Never center text by default; use left-alignment to maintain the Swiss grid.
Use IBM Plex Mono for email tags like {first_name}, API keys, and metrics.
Use 'Grid Borders' surface strategy: Expose the skeleton. Containers should have border-collapse style layouts with visible 1px borders.
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
Card radius: Max 0px to 4px (sharp, structural feel).

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#002080] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#111827] text-[#111827] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#111827] hover:text-white transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-none p-6 shadow-sm

inputs.base: rounded-none border border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white px-4 py-2 text-[#111827] focus:border-[#002FA7] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#002FA7] outline-none transition-all

tables.header: border-b-2 border-[#111827] text-sm uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold py-3

images.description: Minimalist swiss poster abstract geometric background, light grey and stark white with subtle klein blue and signal red accents.
Minimalist tech brand logo, simple geometric folded paper plane, stark contrast.

motion.hover_states: Visible but rigid. Slight scale (1.02) or -translate-y-1 for interactive cards. Strict color inversions for buttons.
motion.transitions: Fast and snappy. 150ms-200ms duration. No bouncy/springy animations. Ease-in-out.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up for table rows and grid items.

page_specific_rules.login: Split screen layout. Left: Crisp white background, left-aligned form with massive typography. Right: The abstract geometric background image covering the full height.
page_specific_rules.dashboard: Bento-style metrics grid at the top. Charts underneath. Use visible borders (border-collapse look) to separate KPI blocks. No rounded corners.
page_specific_rules.campaign_composer: Three-pane layout or wide 2-column. Left/Top: Settings (Excel/Word uploads). Center/Main: HTML WYSIWYG Editor. Use IBM Plex Mono for displaying {} merge tags.
page_specific_rules.templates_library: High-density data tables. Focus on scannability. Use the 'avatar' images for template creators.
page_specific_rules.api_management: Use the 'Retro-Futurism' micro-theme strictly for the API Key display widget (dark background, monospaced text) to contrast with the rest of the light Swiss UI.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts to enforce the sharp, Swiss 'Grid Borders' style.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (dropdowns, dialogs, forms) but strip their default soft radius and drop-shadows to match the 0px/sharp aesthetic.
Install Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for sharp, dense dashboard icons.
Use Recharts for the analytics dashboard charts, styled with plain black lines or the primary International Klein Blue. No gradients in charts.
Code must be in React .js or .jsx (not .tsx as per constraints).
